summary: Comprehensive testing of Seva Setu Bot major enhancements completed. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for 50+ languages, profile creation, feedback buttons, chat, and mic recording. Document validity tracking working correctly with all rules (passport-expiry, birth/death-permanent, marriage-needs_affidavit, copies-90days).
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Extended profile creation with all fields (father_name, mother_name, passport_number, etc.)
✅ Backend: Profile update with extended fields
✅ Backend: Family member addition (spouse, child) with consent
✅ Backend: Get family members list
✅ Backend: Family member 404 for non-existent profile
✅ Backend: Document upload - Original passport with expiry-based validity
✅ Backend: Document upload - Copy with 90-day validity rule (expiring_soon status)
✅ Backend: Document upload - Expired copy (>90 days) returns is_valid=false
✅ Backend: Birth certificate - permanent validity type
✅ Backend: Death certificate - permanent validity type
✅ Backend: Marriage certificate - needs_affidavit=true flag
✅ Backend: Documents summary endpoint with counts (total, valid, expired, expiring_soon, needs_affidavit)
✅ Backend: Existing test profile AMIT-19850315-TEST has all extended fields
✅ Backend: Existing profile has family member (Priya Sharma - spouse)
✅ Backend: Existing profile documents have correct validity
✅ Backend: Feedback endpoint - positive feedback
✅ Backend: Feedback endpoint - negative feedback
✅ Backend: Chat in English
✅ Backend: Chat in Hindi (देवनागरी)
✅ Backend: Chat in Tamil (தமிழ்)
✅ Frontend: 55 languages in language selector (50+ requirement met)
✅ Frontend: All 8 Indian languages present (Hindi, Bengali, Telugu, Tamil, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi)
✅ Frontend: All 6 South African languages present (Afrikaans, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Sepedi, Sesotho, Setswana)
✅ Frontend: International languages present (Arabic, French, Spanish, German, Chinese, Japanese)
✅ Frontend: Profile creation dialog opens with all fields
✅ Frontend: Profile created successfully with unique ID format [NAME]-[DOB]-[HASH]
✅ Frontend: Profile info displays in left panel after creation
✅ Frontend: Profile badge shows at bottom left corner
✅ Frontend: Feedback buttons (👍👎) visible under bot responses
✅ Frontend: Feedback click works and shows toast
✅ Frontend: Chat functionality working with AI responses
✅ Frontend: Typing indicator shows during AI response
✅ Frontend: Mic button visible and starts recording
✅ Frontend: Camera button visible
✅ Frontend: Upload button visible
✅ Frontend: Voice toggle working
seed_data_creation: Test profile AMIT-19850315-TEST with family member (Priya Sharma - spouse) and 3 documents (passport, birth certificate copy, marriage certificate) already exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major enhancements fully tested: 1) 55 languages in selector (22 Indian, 11 South African, 20+ International), 2) Extended profile with family linking working, 3) Document validity system working with all rules. Test profile AMIT-19850315-TEST has family member and documents with various validity states. All backend APIs and frontend UI verified.

mocked_apis.avatar_video: Avatar video is a placeholder image. Full video avatar with lip-sync available with Akool.com upgrade (noted in UI)
mocked_apis.service_application: Service application flow is partial - selection available but full submission flow not complete

categories.indian: 22 languages (Hindi, Bengali, Telugu, Tamil, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Odia, Punjabi, Assamese, Maithili, Santali, Kashmiri, Nepali, Sindhi, Konkani, Dogri, Manipuri, Bodo, Urdu, Sanskrit)
categories.south_african: 11 languages (Afrikaans, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Sepedi, Sesotho, Setswana, siSwati, Tshivenda, Xitsonga, isiNdebele)
categories.international: 22 languages (Arabic, French, Portuguese, Spanish, German, Italian, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Malay, Swahili, Amharic, Hebrew, Persian, Turkish, Polish, Ukrainian, Dutch)

document_validity.summary_endpoint: GET /api/consular/profile/{id}/documents returns {total, valid, expired, expiring_soon, needs_affidavit}

feedback_buttons.behavior: 👍👎 buttons appear under bot responses, click shows toast and changes button state

mic_recording.note: Mic button starts recording, shows 'Listening... Speak now' indicator
